## SIGNAL FOR AI ANALYST

Julien is not optimizing for output right now — he's optimizing for *signal*. The flood of projects (Grassroot Hopper speeches, blog essays, running, values rewrites) is deliberate exploration, not scatter. The frame he gave explicitly: 6 months from now, something will become serious. Right now, he's taking readings.
